executive_summary: On April 15, 2026, OFAC removed one individual from the Venezuela sanctions program. Reinaldo Enrique Munoz Pedroza, a Venezuelan national, was delisted. This change may impact entities with ties to Venezuela. The removal suggests a potential shift in US policy towards Venezuela.

notable_entities.name: Reinaldo Enrique Munoz Pedroza
notable_entities.significance: Removed from the Venezuela sanctions program

risk_implications.description: The removal of Reinaldo Enrique Munoz Pedroza may reduce the risk of inadvertently doing business with a sanctioned individual, but entities should still exercise caution when dealing with Venezuelan nationals and entities.

program_highlights.note: One individual was removed from the program.

compliance_recommendations: Review and update internal watchlists to reflect the removal of Reinaldo Enrique Munoz Pedroza
Continue to exercise caution when dealing with Venezuelan nationals and entities
Monitor OFAC updates for potential future changes to the Venezuela sanctions program
